trigger_event: Nippon Steel and former Sumitomo Metal joined the Cape Lambert Iron Associates JV alongside Mitsui Iron Ore Development.
source_notes: See coal_iron_ore_projects_aus_jpn.csv row 'Robe River'. Pre-1977: Robe River Ltd (Aus) 35%, Mitsui Iron Ore 30%, Cape Lambert Iron Associates (Japanese) 5%, Cliffs WAM (US) 30% = 35% Japanese. Post-1977: Nippon Steel + Sumitomo Metal entered, raising Japanese share to 47% (Mitsui & Co. 33% + Nippon Steel 14%). Source: Rio Tinto 50-yr release; Mininglink Robe River.

trigger_event: Mitsubishi Development acquired QCT Resources (announced Nov 2000) and combined CQCA assets with BHP's Utah International holdings to form the 50:50 BHP Mitsubishi Alliance.
source_notes: See lng_contracts_aus_jpn.csv / coal_iron_ore_projects_aus_jpn.csv. Pre-2001 CQCA structure since 1971: Utah International 85% / Mitsubishi Development 15%. Acquired by BHP 1984. BMA 50:50 effective 28 Jun 2001. Source: BHP Mitsubishi Alliance Wikipedia; NS Energy Business.
